[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10101011 5
1 11011110 6
2 11111001 6
3 01111000 4
4 01100111 5
5 10001101 4
6 11010011 5
7 01111000 4

12 21 11111111 a
23 32 11111111 a

45 54 11001100 4
56 65 11011111 7
67 76 01111011 6
70 07 10111010 5
